title: Flexible Refillable Candle Lighter – Long Bendy Nozzle Butane Gas Lighter for Candles, BBQ, Grill, Fireplace & Kitchen – Adjustable Windproof Flame, Safety Lock, Ergonomic Handle, Reusable (GREY)
features: Light anything, anywhere, with precision and safety using this refillable bendy lighter. Designed for maximum reach and flexibility, this lighter is perfect for candles, gas stoves, BBQ grills, fireplaces, and outdoor use. Its long, adjustable neck lets you easily reach tricky spots while keeping your hands safely away from the flame. With its ergonomic handle, windproof flame, and refillable design, this lighter is built to deliver convenience, comfort, and durability for every home or outdoor

The bendy, flexible neck is the standout feature it allows you to light objects at any angle effortlessly. Whether it’s a deep candle holder, a grill, or a campfire, you can twist and turn the lighter’s neck for precision ignition without straining your wrist or risking burns. 360° adjustable metal neck; Perfect for reaching deep candle jars or lanterns; Keeps hands safely away from flames; It’s the ultimate lighting solution for comfort and control.

Never worry about your flame blowing out. This lighter features a powerful, wind-resistant ignition system that ensures steady lighting indoors and outdoors. Perfect for lighting candles during a breeze, camping in the open, or firing up your BBQ grill without frustration. Windproof and consistent flame; Works perfectly indoors or outdoors; Ideal for grills, stoves, candles, and fireplaces; Enjoy a dependable flame whenever and wherever you need it

Save money and reduce waste with this refillable butane gas lighter. It’s designed for long-term use simply refill it when empty and enjoy lasting performance. Unlike disposable lighters that contribute to plastic waste, this reusable model offers a more sustainable solution.Easy to refill with butane gas (not included); Eco-friendly alternative to disposable lighters; Long-lasting, reliable performance; Practical, planet-friendly, and built to last.

Safety always comes first. The bendy lighter is equipped with a child-resistant ignition switch and flame control adjustment, giving you total control and peace of mind during use. Safety lock prevents accidental ignition; Adjustable flame for different lighting needs; Extended reach keeps fingers away from heat; Designed for reliability and user safety, making it ideal for households with children.
description: Flexible Bendy Lighter – Perfect for candles, gas stoves, BBQs, and fireplaces. Features a long adjustable neck for safe lighting at any angle, ergonomic comfort grip, and reliable ignition. Durable, refillable, and ideal for indoor or outdoor use.
